data.title: Write RED test for check-plugin-boundary pre-commit hook
data.description: testing_mode: RED | Layer 0 | Create tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh (chmod +x). Test must be RED before T2. Asserts: hook script does not exist yet (RED gate), conf exists, conf has comment block, hook exits 0 on current plugins/dso/ state (no violations), hook exits non-zero on prohibited path with error naming allowlist file, hook exits 0 when conf missing (fail-open), .pre-commit-config.yaml has hook entry. Use PASS/FAIL counters. Create temp git repo for staged-file simulation. Files: tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh
